full_text:
Lady Kong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Kong. Didn’t accept offer of broth as she was uncertain of fate. Met her execution bravely. Lady Kong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Lady Kong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
